title: Civil rights and First Amendment
summary: Speech retaliation, access discrimination, due process, and official retaliation questions.

title: Immigration and due process
summary: Constitutional and administrative-law questions related to immigration status, parole, appeals, and citizenship.

title: Public integrity and corruption
summary: Government-integrity issues involving bribery, gratuities, misuse of office, and related public-corruption theories.

title: Religion and state
summary: Potential Establishment Clause, neutrality, and discriminatory implementation issues.

title: War powers and international law
summary: Questions about authorization for force, civilian protection, and the legal basis for military action.
